description.value:
Prerequisite: Any 1 meta-Chakra feat, Genjutsu 12 ranks.

Benefit: When applied to a Genjutsu technique, it has a 20% chance to resist being dispelled (when someone attempts to dispel it, roll to determine if the at- tempt is resisted). The technique's Perform Requirements increase by 2, and the Chakra Cost increases by 1 for every 2 Ranks of the technique (rounded up).

Special: A technique enhanced by this feat cannot be enhanced by other meta-Chakra feats.
